title: Terracotta Knights
description: A clay soldiers remake! Customize their armor, their color, their weaponry, and make them fight!
body:
Terracotta Knights
===

Terracotta Knights is inspired by the original Clay Soldiers mod by SanAndreaP. The mod is currently in development and is only offered in creative for right now. The only crafting recipe that's available is dyeing your knights.

## Features

#### *Dyeing Knights:*
Knights can come with a variety of colors using the vanilla minecraft dyes. To dye your terracotta knight, insert one of the knights with the desired dye of your choice in a crafting table.

![Dying knights in crafting table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GgTW6G1d/images/c2ae5674587e5dbb99bdb711e97f56169cc08b0f.gif)

Different colored knights **WILL** fight each other to the death.

#### *Using the remote:*
The signal device will kill knights in a 30 by 30 radius!

![Killing knights with remote](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GgTW6G1d/images/b21f59227d9e7c34ca78bcb7be24e51c66a2edfc.gif)


Equipped knights will drop their armor and weapons using the remote.
![Knights equip and drop armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GgTW6G1d/images/818d191f427e1cb8e7092697ceb94ae193a89d08.gif)





There are easter eggs to be found by naming knights 👀



Coming Soon
---
* Horses
* Crossbows
* Stackable Armor
* Shields
* Powerups
* Full Recipes 

## Dependencies

QFAPI/QSL
